data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of time tracking by project phase and deliverable. However, the evidence from the linked use case primarily focuses on the overall timesheet and invoice generation without explicitly demonstrating how time is tracked by project phase and deliverable. The absence of specific endpoints or data that confirm this functionality indicates a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: Time tracking by project phase and deliverable is not evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint for time tracking validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that time can be tracked by project phase and deliverable.
